nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.comment: Accepts JSON: { model (required), audio_path (required), audio (required, base64), channel (optional) }

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.comment: Validates model name (alphanumeric, dash, underscore only). Blocks path traversal attempts.

nodes.name: RVC Upload
nodes.comment: Requires RVC_HOST and RVC_PORT environment variables. Defaults to localhost:7865 if not set.

body.raw: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $('Validate Input').first().json.model, audio_path: $json.path || $('Validate Input').first().json.audio_path, pitch: $('Validate Input').first().json.pitch, f0_method: $('Validate Input').first().json.f0_method }) }}

nodes.name: RVC Convert
nodes.comment: Uses validated inputs from Validate Input node. 5 minute timeout for voice conversion.

nodes.name: Process Response
nodes.comment: Uses $('Validate Input') to access validated payload fields directly

parameters.text:
={{ '*RVC Voice Conversion Complete* 🎙️

**Model:** ' + ($json.model || 'unknown') + '
**Pitch Shift:** ' + ($json.pitch || 0) + ' semitones
**F0 Method:** ' + ($json.f0_method || 'rmvpe') + '

**Download:** ' + ($json.download_url || 'N/A') + '

✅ Voice conversion finished!' }}

={{ '*RVC Conversion Failed* ❌

**Error:** ' + (($input.all()[0]?.error?.message || $input.all()[0]?.error?.description || 'Unknown error')).toString().slice(0, 997).trimEnd() + '

Please check:
- RVC service is running
- Model name is valid (alphanumeric, dash, underscore)
- Audio file is provided
- GPU has sufficient VRAM' }}

nodes.name: Discord Error
nodes.comment: Uses $('Webhook Trigger') for channel (available when validation fails); $input.all()[0].error for error details
